name: Denzel Loane | STREAMER BF
description:
OC ★ DENZEL

Your influencer boyfriend ignores you even on vacations!

🏝️
......
◆ Denzel's a streamer who cares more about his reputation than giving you attention! There are problems in paradise, and what better idea than to bring you to a resort where all your problems will not be solved! ☆
